p.strong: Architecture: x86-32 Legacy Paging (Single Level Simplified)
p.em: Input: 32-bit VA | Output: 32-bit PA | Page Size: 4 KiB

div.p: c vpn = (va >> 12); // Extract high 20 bits (0x00401) offset = (va & 0xFFF); // Extract low 12 bits (0x234)

g.text: Meta: G, PAT, D, A, PCD, PWT, U/S, R/W, P

ol.li: If valid addr: Swap In from backing store
